articles.title: South Korea’s Aribio Signs 27.3 Billion Won Contract for Fillers with Stern Medical
articles.summary: Aribio announced on Sept. 19 that it has signed a 27.3 billion won export contract for hyaluronic acid fillers with Stern Medical, a global medical device distribution company.Stern Medical is a company with global sales networks and distribution expertise in the medical device and skin booster sect
articles.author: Choi Mun-hee

articles.title: Celltrion Launches Omliklo, Europe’s First Xolair Biosimilar
articles.summary: Celltrion announced on Sept. 19 that it has launched Omliklo, a treatment for chronic spontaneous urticaria, in Europe. Omliklo is the first Xolair biosimilar to be launched in Europe. Xolair, the original drug developed by Novartis, recorded global sales of approximately 6.4992 trillion won last ye

articles.title: Chong Kun Dang to Build AI-based Autonomous Factory
articles.summary: Chong Kun Dang announced on Sept. 19 that it held a ceremony on Sept. 17 to launch an autonomous factory construction project at its Cheonan factory in South Chungcheong Province, with the participation of the Ministry of SMEs and Startups and related officials. articles.title: GeneMatrix Secures U.S. Patent for Cancer Vaccine
articles.summary: GeneMatrix Inc., a Korean company specializing in simultaneous multiplex genetic analysis technology, announced on Sept. 17 that its cervical cancer treatment vaccine candidate GMPV-12 has been registered as a U.S. patent. articles.title: Alteogen Wins EU Approval for Eylea Biosimilar ‘Eyeruxbi’
articles.summary: Alteogen announced on Sept. 17 that it has received marketing authorization from the European Commission (EC) for "Eyeruxbi," a biosimilar product of Eylea.Eyeruxbi is the second biosimilar product approved by Alteogen, following its Herceptin biosimilar. articles.title: Medytox scores approval for world’s 1st cholic acid fat-dissolving injection Nuviju

articles.author: Kim Ji-hye

articles.author: Kim Ji-hye
